_note: Hand-curated baseline of well-known Amazon ASINs across herbs, TCM, mushrooms, calming supplements, and gentle body care. Each row carries an Amazon affiliate tag of peacefulnigh0e-20. Run scripts/verify-apothecary.mjs in production to spot-check listings; in the sandbox Amazon will block automated GETs.
